calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Gerald Lau, Esq. appeared for defendant and cross-complainant Tri Valley Food Services.
Henry Cai, administrative manager for plaintiff, and Willie Hui, owner of the company, were placed under oath and examined.
No apearance by plaintiff and cross-defendant Marcos Bonnilla, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 10, 2009.
Roe cross-defendants were dismissed today, September 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of defendant and cross-complainant Tri Valley Food Services, Inc., and against defendant and cross-complainant Marcos Bonilla, an individual as follows:

Compensatory Damages - $10,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $20,000.00
Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - To Be Determined.
Costs - $663.00.

Counsel for defendant and cross-complainant shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than September 18, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Dismissal - No Appearance

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Defendant Tri Valley Food Services, Inc.'s Motion to compel response to discovery and for sanctions granted as follows:
1. All objections are waived except for attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified response to defendant's form interrogatories (general), special interrogatories request for admissions, and request for production of documents and things (set one) within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Sanctions shall issue against plaintiff in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Set For Trial On Sep-14-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-27-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2009 Off Calendar
